textByHash.0df77baca40bd2f275366c9983b59cfff35db998: Of course I still don't know what colour I should get. I don't want to accidentally offend the wrong company of course.
textByHash.1d8fea22069359a5fa6d93571d66794c3ca43c9c: No, I don't think so. I think I'd rather buy something with my money after all.
textByHash.24d4a572b54bdc85eb6fc4a7b7081da3e58ffae6: I don't do a lot of adventuring to be honest.
textByHash.36b23e9d5f6fa192f59544fbff15ce02533e305f: No one is selling hats here, that's not a very helpful suggestion at all.
textByHash.4874afe3aab58895b1dff5cc7a5fa06921a4ec68: Only if you can help me make a suggestion on what to buy.
textByHash.575f2dfcfabdff8e5c4f827c7170a0c8f3f30f4b: I don't think so. The warhammer shop is run by the Red Axe. I'd rather stay out of there.
textByHash.65615859973ac8e7773c3174e2330b31016126f8: No, not really. I just need some advice on what to buy, that's all.
textByHash.763aa70243457de900a0eca85791477cad1b3407: They're all a lot of bullies if you ask me.
textByHash.b6881f64f9d3004a48d5320a6f043d827b537cd8: You're right, this is a little drab. I shouldn't really go around Keldagrim-West wearing this, should I?
textByHash.bcdd7d6e8b70ca4f9e1a055d0709bea0d3b83b39: They may have, but I still think that shopkeeper is in league with them, banners or no.
textByHash.e031d8d97a661146311f6170f3fa5d7146fb9d84: Now that's the best idea I've heard all day.
textByHash.e80340a945da1ab51dd94a259075c5c33fa05894: What to buy? What to buy?
textByHash.f303c432e28d3ce1231b8d47e1266f60cb545385: What would I do with a rope?
